title: Floral Tender Ethiopian Cabbage Stir-fry
description: This lazy-sunday dish features tender cabbage leaves infused with a floral flavor from Moroccan spices, perfect for those who want an easy yet delicious vegetarian meal.
instructions: Chop the cabbage into large pieces and blanch it in boiling water for about 5 minutes.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic, sautéing until translucent.
Stir in Moroccan Harissa Paste, turmeric powder, and salt. Pour in the cooked cabbage and tomatoes, tossing to coat well.
Cook for another 5-7 minutes or until all ingredients are heated through and the sauce has thickened slightly.
Serve hot as a side dish.
